message:
docs(raptorq): update closure signoff — Track-G in_progress, Track-H closed

Remove asupersync-p8o9m from blocker list (Track-H now closed).
Update track status table: Track-G in_progress, Track-H closed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -119,8 +119,8 @@
       "track_code": "G",
       "track_bead_id": "asupersync-2cyx5",
       "required_status": "closed",
-      "current_status": "open",
-      "status_reason": "Track-G is open and currently unassigned after stale-owner reset; governance aggregation still blocks final sign-off.",
+      "current_status": "in_progress",
+      "status_reason": "Track-G is actively owned and in progress; governance aggregation still blocks final sign-off until closure.",

       "evidence_refs": [
         "artifacts/raptorq_controlled_rollout_policy_v1.json",

     },

 - Packet state: `draft_blocked`
 - Go/no-go: `no_go_pending_dependency_closure`
 - Current blockers:
-1. `asupersync-p8o9m`
-2. `asupersync-2cyx5`

 This packet is intentionally execution-ready but not final until dependency
